channel.title: Lakefront Leak & Drain Content Pipe
channel.description: Automated Plumbing Leads for Cleveland and Cuyahoga County

item.title: Why Cleveland Basements Flood
item.description: 🚨 CLEVELAND HOMEOWNERS: Is your basement ready for the spring thaw? Learn why local foundations fail. #Cleveland #Plumbing

item.title: Signs Your Sump Pump Is Failing
item.description: Don't wait for a flood to find out your pump is dead. Listen for these 3 warning signs! #HomeMaintenance

item.title: Preventing Clogs in Multifamily Buildings
item.description: 🏢 Property Managers: A single clog can ruin a whole stack. Here is your preventive checklist. #ClevelandApartments

item.title: Water Heater Leaks: Repair vs. Replace
item.description: 💧 Is that puddle around your tank a simple fix or a total replacement? #PlumbingTips

item.title: How to Fix Sewer Smells in Your Basement
item.description: 🤢 Basement smelling like a swamp? It might be a dry floor drain. #ClevelandHome

item.title: Hydro-Jetting vs. Snaking
item.description: 🍳 Stop clearing the same clog twice. Learn why hydro-jetting is the only real fix. #ClevelandBusiness

item.title: Benefits of Sewer Camera Inspections
item.description: 📸 Our cameras show you exactly where the roots and cracks are before we dig. #TechPlumbing

item.title: Checking for Leaks After a Cleveland Winter
item.description: ❄️ The thaw is here. Check your outdoor spigots for hidden burst pipes today! #Cleveland #SpringReady

channel.item:
Signs of Main Sewer Line Clogs https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/blog/signs-of-main-sewer-line-clog/ 🚽 Multiple drains backing up? Gurgling toilets? You likely have a main line issue. #PlumbingHelp Mon, 06 Apr 2026 10:00:00 EST <media:content url="https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1e8xTL1hnn37_a_XL9
Drain Maintenance for Property Managers https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/blog/drain-maintenance-for-property-managers/ 🏢 Keep your tenants happy and your basement dry. #CuyahogaCounty Wed, 08 Apr 2026 10:00:00 EST
Preparing Plumbing for Vacation https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/blog/preparing-plumbing-for-vacation/ ✈️ Leaving Cleveland? Don't come home to a flood. Follow this checklist. #TravelTips Thu, 09 Apr 2026 10:00:00 EST
High-Tech Drain Cleaning https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/blog/high-tech-drain-cleaning-services/ ⚡ We destroy clogs without tearing up your yard. #Innovation #Plumbing Fri, 10 Apr 2026 10:00:00 EST
Causes of Low Water Pressure https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/blog/causes-of-low-water-pressure/ 🚿 Shower feeling weak? It could be a leak or a hidden pipe burst. #HomeFix Sat, 11 Apr 2026 10:00:00 EST
Protecting Drains from Tree Roots https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/blog/protecting-drains-from-tree-roots/ 🌳 Tree roots love your sewer lines. Learn how to stop them. #Landscaping #Cleveland Sun, 12 Apr 2026 10:00:00 EST
The "No-Flush" List https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/blog/what-not-to-flush/ 🚫 "Flushable" wipes are a lie. See what clogs your sewer line. #Maintenance Mon, 13 Apr 2026 10:00:00 EST
Basement Waterproofing vs. Drain Care https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/blog/basement-waterproofing-vs-drain-care/ 💧 Don't spend $20k on waterproofing if the problem is just a clogged drain. #ClevelandRealEstate Tue, 14 Apr 2026 10:00:00 EST
Emergency Plumbing Plan https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/blog/how-to-create-emergency-plumbing-plan/ 🆘 Do you know where your shut-off is? Every homeowner needs this plan. #SafetyFirst Wed, 15 Apr 2026 10:00:00 EST
Common Commercial Plumbing Emergencies https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/blog/common-commercial-plumbing-emergencies/ 🏢 From collapses to overflows—know what to look for. #FacilityManagement Thu, 16 Apr 2026 10:00:00 EST
Benefits of Annual Drain Cleaning https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/blog/benefits-of-annual-drain-cleaning/ 🧹 An annual jetting keeps your house worry-free. #ClevelandHome #Plumbing Fri, 17 Apr 2026 10:00:00 EST
